servinfo.title: Excessive detonation – Engine continuously generates sharp, metallic knocking sound that changes with throttle opening.
servinfo.ptxt: Perform troubleshooting referring to the following points when ECM has detected no DTC and no abnormality has been found in Visual Inspection and Engine Basic Inspection .

condition.ptxt: Excessive detonation – Engine continuously generates sharp, metallic knocking sound that changes with throttle opening.

ps.ptxt: Clogged fuel filter (faulty fuel pump) or fuel lines

action.ptxt: Fuel Pressure Check or Fuel Pump and Its Circuit Check

ps.ptxt: Air drawn in through intake manifold or throttle body gasket
Poor performance of knock sensor, ECT sensor or MAF sensor

action.ptxt: Knock Sensor On-Vehicle Inspection , ECT Sensor Inspection or MAF and IAT Sensor Inspection
Fuel Injector Circuit Check or Fuel Injector Inspection

ptxt.intxref: Inspection of ECM and Its Circuits

action.ptxt: Cylinder, Piston and Piston Ring Inspection and/or Piston Pin and Connecting Rod Inspection

item.ptxt: VVT actuator: VVT Actuator, Camshaft, Tappet and Shim Inspection
Valve timing: Timing Chain and Chain Tensioner Inspection
OCV oil circuit: Timing Chain Cover Inspection
